---
mode: agent
description: Design a lab outline from learning objectives and concept scope
---

[agents/outline-builder.agent.md](../agents/outline-builder.agent.md)

Design a new lab outline using the agent definition above.

**Fill in before running:**

- **Topic or capability:** [what concept, skill, or workflow the lab should teach]
- **Target audience:** [who is taking the lab]
- **Environment:** [local VS Code, cloud IDE, etc.]
- **Available tools/frameworks:** [what can be used, with versions]
- **Constraints:** [tone, language, tooling, out-of-scope topics]
